name: Banana-Oat Bread
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Hot Milk (or Soymilk or Water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the rolled oat bran, rolled oat flakes, and hot milk (or soymilk or water). Set aside to cool.
2. In a separate bowl, mash the ripe bananas. Mix in the honey, vegetable oil, and beaten egg whites until well combined.
3. Stir the wet ingredients into the cooled oat mixture.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the whole wheat pastry flour, baking powder (non-alum), and cinnamon.
5. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the oat mixture until just combined.
6. Pour the batter into an oiled bread pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until done.
Source: Arrowhead Mills "Oat Bran Recipes" tri-fold
